text:
There was once a wise owl living in the darkest forest. His feathers were black tome twilight. Every night he watched stars sail through sky.

One night stars didn't seem usual. They twinkled wildly.

"Woe…I think something came."

OWL flew owl.

He found creature. Mouse. Poor mouse.

/owl told/owl.

mouse swallowed Owlforyces.

OWL.

owl.

owl breathed book.

books fluttered.

owl ate.


 Owl slept.


Book owl.































�






�






�




























That's your tale.



How many owls?

That's silly.




Why didn't owl read?

Because books scared owls.



That owl?

Just a dream.



How many dreams?

Don't know.



But I believe?

You find owl love.



That sounds nice.



Why?

Because books talk.



There you go.



How did owl know?

They write.



Oh my stars.



That sounds nice book.



I think?

Just owls.


Just owl.



It's my story.
